items.title: What negative gearing and transgender rights reveal about the Liberals' populist strategy

items.summary: In a modern-day cost-of-living crisis, the classic 1817 novel's tale of inheritance and wealth still rings true.

items.summary: A court has heard Donny Hobbs, 67, told police he would drive through Mudgee Police Station, in western New South Wales, shortly before the alleged incident.

items.title: Tasmania chosen to supply blood samples for global Parkinson's disease study

Tasmania has been chosen to contribute blood samples to a global study aimed at improving understanding of the genetics behind Parkinson's disease.
